summary: Give me the exact command at the start of the terminal to do this

prompt.text: Give me the exact command at the start of the terminal to do this

response.text:
Use this from the repo root:

```bash
sqlite3 "/Users/joe/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb"
```

Then inside the sqlite prompt:

```sql
select key from cursorDiskKV where key like 'bubbleId:%' limit 20;
```

To fetch a specific bubble:

```sql
select cast(value as text) from cursorDiskKV
where key = 'bubbleId:<composer_id>:<bubble_id>';
```

meta.session_title: Cursor ingestion plan for full prompt/response extraction
